{{CargoOrgan
|name=Surtur's Divine Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10712
|idx=70
|description=A wrath that sunders worlds — rainbow hues shimmer faintly in its gaze, hiding immeasurable power. When unleashed, none can fathom its devastation.
|skill=Before round start, awaken the soul of Chaos Fire, causing the next attack to deal DMG equal to 220% of ATK!
|hp=2420
|def=219
|atk=211
|rush=398
|gene1=During exploration, CRIT DMG +20%
|gene2=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene3=Crit DMG +10%
|gene4=Water DMG +120
|gene5=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene6=Chance of Breaking Enemy +4%
|gene7=Water DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
